description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Eternal Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, if only one target survives, inflicts the same effect on the enemy again.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>영원한 출혈</color>을 부여합니다.\n공격 후 생존한 대상이 한 명이라면 적에게 동일 효과를 한번 더 사용합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【絶えざる出血】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n攻撃後、戦場に敵が単体の場合、敵に追加で<color=#28d9ed>【絶えざる出血】</color>1個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>永恒出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n攻击后,若只有1名目标存活,则再次对敌人造成一次相同效果。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. After attacking, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Eternal Bleeding</color> on all enemies and grants <color=#28d9ed>Stealth</color> to all allies except for the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, if only one target survives, inflicts the same effect on the enemy again.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>영원한 출혈</color>을 부여하고, 자신을 제외한 아군 전체에게는 <color=#28d9ed>은신</color>을 부여합니다.\n공격 후 생존한 대상이 한 명이라면 적에게 동일 효과를 한번 더 사용합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>【絶えざる出血】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、自分を除く味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>隠れ身</color>を付与する。\n攻撃後、戦場に敵が単体の場合、敵に追加で<color=#28d9ed>【絶えざる出血】</color>1個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后,对全体敌人造成<color=#28d9ed>永恒出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并使除自身以外的全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>隐身</color>效果。\n攻击后,若只有1名目标存活,则再次对敌人造成一次相同效果。

description.en: Attacks all enemies, and gains <color=#28d9ed>Retribution's Dominion</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. (Irremovable)\nIf already granted <color=#28d9ed>Retribution's Dominion</color>, <color=#28d9ed>detonates</color> all <color=#28d9ed>Eternal Bleeding</color> effects on the target, and increases damage dealt by detonation by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>징벌의 영역</color>을 획득합니다. (해제 불가)\n이미 <color=#28d9ed>징벌의 영역</color>을 보유 중이었다면 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>영원한 출혈</color>을 모두 <color=#28d9ed>폭발</color>시키며, 폭발에 의한 피해는  <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【懲罰の領域】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。(解除不可)\nすでに<color=#28d9ed>【懲罰の領域】</color>がある場合、対象に付与されている<color=#28d9ed>【絶えざる出血】</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>破裂</color>させ、破裂のダメージが<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并获得<color=#28d9ed>惩戒领域</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。(无法解除)\n若已附带<color=#28d9ed>惩戒领域</color>效果,则<color=#28d9ed>引爆</color>目标附带的全部<color=#28d9ed>永恒出血</color>效果,引爆造成的伤害提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
